level_signals: Base pay range $74,800–$110,000 USD consistent with early-career associate level

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You have 2-4 years of experience in consulting / strategy / business development / program management / technology / banking or related experience
You have a bachelor's degree or higher
You are analytical – You let data tell the story and you're comfortable modeling in Excel.
You have a proven track record of leading initiatives, working cross-functionally, and succeeding in a team first environment
You can independently translate high-level goals into actionable plans.
strong written and verbal communication skills are a must.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: high-growth or early-stage startup experience is a plus

scope.surface: Live Order Apps & Tablet team — merchant-facing hardware, software, and AI-powered operational workflows for managing DoorDash orders
scope.business_model: B2B marketplace (merchant technology products and hardware)
primary_metrics_inferred: Merchant adoption of live order management tools and tablet hardware
Impact of strategic pilots and product launches
core_responsibilities: Drive strategy and execution across high-impact merchant technology and operational initiatives
Build structured analyses and business cases to evaluate operational performance and merchant adoption
Scope, run, and scale pilots and experiments that improve merchant workflows and reduce operational friction
Partner cross-functionally with Product, Engineering, Analytics, Operations, Procurement, Sales, B2B Marketing, and international teams
Develop go-to-market strategies, launch experiments and pilots, and support growth initiatives for live order management tools and tablet hardware
Bring structure to complexity and drive initiatives from strategy through execution

green_flags: Clear product surface and team ownership (Live Order Apps & Tablet)
Position fill deadline disclosed (7/13/26), suggesting active hiring
Comprehensive benefits package described in detail
Encourages diverse applicants and states inclusive hiring practices
red_flags: Work location type is unclear — no city, remote/hybrid/onsite designation provided in the JD body
Salary range is relatively wide ($35K spread) and localized by work location without specifying which cities/tiers apply

location.type (not stated in JD body; left as 'unclear')
